text.title: rust-testing-unit Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the rust-testing-unit methodology end-to-end.

step.name: colocate-test-module
step.action: Add #[cfg(test)] mod tests { use super::*; } at the bottom of the file.

step.name: identify-mockable-traits
step.action: List trait dependencies; never mock concrete types.

step.name: write-mocks
step.action: mockall::mock! for each trait; set expectations per test.

step.name: control-async-time
step.action: Add tokio::time::pause() and advance() for time-dependent paths.
step.decision-gate: If SUT calls spawn_blocking, switch flavor to multi_thread.
